activities_projects.title: Main Characters List
activities_projects.objective: Identify the main characters in the prose
steps: Read the lesson carefully
List the main characters mentioned
Write one sentence about each character

activities_projects.title: Character Sketch of Tricki
steps: Read the description of Tricki
Write 4–5 lines describing Tricki’s condition and behaviour

activities_projects.title: Mrs Pumphrey’s Behaviour
activities_projects.objective: Analyse Mrs Pumphrey’s role in the story
steps: Read the lesson
Write three points showing how Mrs Pumphrey treats Tricki
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands cause of conflict in the story

activities_projects.title: Cause of Tricki’s Illness
activities_projects.objective: Understand the reason for Tricki’s illness
steps: Identify what made Tricki unhealthy
Write the reasons in 3–4 sentences

activities_projects.title: Treatment Given by the Vet
steps: Read the part describing Tricki’s treatment
List the steps taken by the narrator to cure Tricki

activities_projects.title: Title Justification
activities_projects.objective: Understand the meaning of the title
steps: Think about the title of the lesson
Write 3–4 sentences explaining why it is suitable

activities_projects.title: Sequence of Events
activities_projects.objective: Understand the flow of the story
steps: Identify four major events in the story
Write them in the correct order

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary from the Lesson
steps: Select five new words from the lesson
Write their meanings and use them in sentences

activities_projects.title: Moral of the Story
steps: Think about the lesson’s message
Write the moral in your own words

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Connection
activities_projects.objective: Relate the prose to real life
steps: Think about over-care or overfeeding in real life
Write 3–4 sentences connecting it to the lesson
